designSystem.fontFamily: -apple-system, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
designSystem.style: Funnel (3-Step Conversion) with bold geometric shapes, high contrast duotone, energetic block layout. Dark primary (#0F0F23) and secondary (#1E1B4B) surfaces with vibrant CTA (#E11D48) accents. Light and dark theme support with smooth transitions.
